story.title: Aamilah and the Dragon's Treasure
story.lesson: True treasure is found in giving to others

character.name: Aamilah
character.appearance_description: A bright-eyed 7-year-old girl, racially ambiguous with light tan skin and straight brown hair down to her shoulders. She has a gap-toothed smile and carries a magnifying glass everywhere. On her adventure she wears a golden detective badge, a tan explorer vest with many pockets, and her favorite purple boots.

style_prefix: Children's comic book illustration in the style of Dav Pilkey's Dog Man: bold black outlines, flat bright colors, simple cartoonish shapes, hand-drawn feel, expressive faces, white background, no text or words in the image.

pages.scene_description: Children's comic book illustration in the style of Dav Pilkey's Dog Man: bold black outlines, flat bright colors, simple cartoonish shapes, hand-drawn feel, expressive faces, no text or words in the image. A brave 7-year-old girl with light tan skin and straight brown hair down to her shoulders, wearing a golden detective badge and purple boots, holding a glowing treasure chest above her head triumphantly. Behind her, a big friendly cartoon dragon peeks out from behind a mountain with a goofy smile.

pages.text_content:
Today was the most important day of Aamilah's entire life.

She was turning seven.

Seven felt different from six. Seven felt like something big was about to happen.
pages.scene_description: Children's comic book illustration in the style of Dav Pilkey's Dog Man: bold black outlines, flat bright colors, simple cartoonish shapes, hand-drawn feel, expressive faces, no text or words in the image. A cozy bedroom in warm morning light. A 7-year-old girl with light tan skin and straight brown hair down to her shoulders sits up in bed, eyes cartoonishly wide with excitement, colorful confetti and balloons floating all around her. A birthday cake with seven candles sits on a table nearby.

pages.text_content:
After breakfast, there was a knock at the door.

A woman in a long coat and a wide-brimmed hat handed Aamilah a golden envelope.

"Happy Birthday, Aamilah," the woman said with a wink. "The Detective Agency has been watching you. You are ready."

Inside the envelope was a shiny golden badge and a map.
pages.scene_description: Children's comic book illustration in the style of Dav Pilkey's Dog Man: bold black outlines, flat bright colors, simple cartoonish shapes, hand-drawn feel, expressive faces, no text or words in the image. A mysterious woman in a long coat and wide-brimmed hat stands in a doorway, handing a glowing golden envelope to a 7-year-old girl with light tan skin and straight brown hair down to her shoulders, who is wide-eyed with amazement. A golden detective badge gleams inside the open envelope.

pages.text_content:
The map showed faraway places — a jungle, a desert, a mountain range — and at the end, a large red X.

"A treasure hunt," Aamilah whispered.

She pinned the badge to her vest, pulled on her purple boots, and grabbed her magnifying glass.

"I am Detective Aamilah," she said. "And I am on the case."
pages.scene_description: Children's comic book illustration in the style of Dav Pilkey's Dog Man: bold black outlines, flat bright colors, simple cartoonish shapes, hand-drawn feel, expressive faces, no text or words in the image. A 7-year-old girl with light tan skin and straight brown hair down to her shoulders stands heroically at her front door, one foot forward, magnifying glass raised high, golden badge on her tan explorer vest, purple boots on her feet. She holds a cartoon treasure map with a big red X. A swirling colorful portal of adventure fills the doorway behind her.

pages.text_content:
The map took her to faraway lands.

She crossed a jungle where the trees sang songs. She tiptoed over a bridge made of clouds. She sailed a river of golden sand.

With every step, the X on the map grew closer.
pages.scene_description: Children's comic book illustration in the style of Dav Pilkey's Dog Man: bold black outlines, flat bright colors, simple cartoonish shapes, hand-drawn feel, expressive faces, no text or words in the image. Three comic panels side by side: panel one shows a 7-year-old girl with light tan skin and straight brown hair down to her shoulders running through a bright green cartoon jungle with happy singing trees; panel two shows her tiptoeing across a fluffy cloud bridge high in the sky; panel three shows her sailing a golden sand river on a tiny wooden raft.

pages.text_content:
Then she saw it.

A tall dark cave carved into the side of a jagged mountain. Strange green smoke drifted from the opening. Strange rumbling sounds came from deep inside.

Aamilah took a deep breath.

"Detectives are brave," she told herself. "And I am a detective."
pages.scene_description: Children's comic book illustration in the style of Dav Pilkey's Dog Man: bold black outlines, flat bright colors, simple cartoonish shapes, hand-drawn feel, expressive faces, no text or words in the image. A 7-year-old girl with light tan skin and straight brown hair down to her shoulders stands tiny before a huge dark cartoon cave entrance in a jagged purple mountain. Bright green cartoon smoke puffs out of the cave. The sky blazes orange and violet. The girl looks up bravely, magnifying glass in hand.

pages.text_content:
Inside the cave, asleep on a pile of gold, was the biggest dragon she had ever seen.

His scales shimmered like emeralds. His breath came out in slow, warm puffs that smelled like cinnamon.

In the center of the pile — the treasure chest.

Aamilah moved very, very slowly.
pages.scene_description: Children's comic book illustration in the style of Dav Pilkey's Dog Man: bold black outlines, flat bright colors, simple cartoonish shapes, hand-drawn feel, expressive faces, no text or words in the image. Inside a bright cartoon cave, a huge emerald-green cartoon dragon sleeps on a pile of gold coins and jewels, little Z's floating above his head. A glowing treasure chest sits in the center. A 7-year-old girl with light tan skin and straight brown hair down to her shoulders tiptoes in from the cave entrance, one hand over her mouth, eyes huge.

pages.text_content:
She tiptoed past his tail... past his giant claws... past one enormous nostril that sniffed in her direction.

She froze.

The dragon smacked his lips and kept snoring.

Aamilah exhaled slowly and crept the last few steps to the treasure chest. She opened it — and gasped. It was the most beautiful thing she had ever seen.
pages.scene_description: Children's comic book illustration in the style of Dav Pilkey's Dog Man: bold black outlines, flat bright colors, simple cartoonish shapes, hand-drawn feel, expressive faces, no text or words in the image. Close-up comic scene: a 7-year-old girl with light tan skin and straight brown hair down to her shoulders is frozen mid-tiptoe, inches from the sleeping cartoon dragon's giant nostril which is flaring. Her eyes are enormous with fear. The glowing treasure chest is right behind her. A single sweat drop flies from her forehead.

pages.text_content:
But just as she lifted the chest — ROAR.

The cave shook. The gold coins rattled. The dragon's enormous green eyes opened wide.

"WHO HAS WOKEN ME?" the dragon bellowed, and his tail swooped down, wrapping gently but firmly around Aamilah.

"I have," said Aamilah in a small but steady voice. "I'm Detective Aamilah. I'm sorry I woke you."
pages.scene_description: Children's comic book illustration in the style of Dav Pilkey's Dog Man: bold black outlines, flat bright colors, simple cartoonish shapes, hand-drawn feel, expressive faces, no text or words in the image. The cartoon dragon is wide awake, eyes blazing orange, mouth open in a big cartoon roar sending gold coins flying everywhere. His tail is coiled around a 7-year-old girl with light tan skin and straight brown hair down to her shoulders, who hugs the treasure chest and stares up at the dragon with a nervous but brave expression.

pages.text_content:
The dragon looked at her for a very long time.

"No one has ever said sorry before," he said, in a voice like rolling thunder.

"What will make this right?" Aamilah asked.

Then she felt something wiggle in her mouth. She reached in with her finger...

Out came a wobbly tooth. It must have come loose during all the tiptoeing.
pages.scene_description: Children's comic book illustration in the style of Dav Pilkey's Dog Man: bold black outlines, flat bright colors, simple cartoonish shapes, hand-drawn feel, expressive faces, no text or words in the image. A 7-year-old girl with light tan skin and straight brown hair down to her shoulders holds up a tiny white tooth pinched between her fingers, eyes wide with surprise. The cartoon dragon leans its enormous head in very close, eyes crossed and fascinated, staring at the tiny tooth. Funny size contrast.

pages.text_content:
"A tooth!" the dragon rumbled, and his eyes grew very wide. "Do you know how rare a child's first fallen tooth is? It is the rarest treasure in all the world!"

Aamilah looked at the tooth. She looked at the dragon. She held it out.

"Then you should have it," she said.

The dragon's tail unfurled. He set her down gently.
pages.scene_description: Children's comic book illustration in the style of Dav Pilkey's Dog Man: bold black outlines, flat bright colors, simple cartoonish shapes, hand-drawn feel, expressive faces, no text or words in the image. A 7-year-old girl with light tan skin and straight brown hair down to her shoulders stands on the open cartoon palm of the dragon's giant claw, holding out her tiny tooth with both hands. The dragon's big cartoon face is nearby, eyes wide and glistening with emotion, a happy tear rolling down his cheek.

pages.text_content:
"You may keep the treasure," the dragon said softly. "And you may always come back."

Aamilah grinned her new gap-toothed grin, tucked the chest under her arm, and ran — back through the golden river, over the cloud bridge, through the singing jungle — all the way home.
pages.scene_description: Children's comic book illustration in the style of Dav Pilkey's Dog Man: bold black outlines, flat bright colors, simple cartoonish shapes, hand-drawn feel, expressive faces, no text or words in the image. A 7-year-old girl with light tan skin and straight brown hair down to her shoulders sprints joyfully through a bright cartoon jungle, big gap-toothed grin, treasure chest tucked under one arm, purple boots kicking up cartoon flowers and leaves. Far in the background, the cartoon dragon waves one big claw from his mountain.

pages.text_content:
Back home, Aamilah opened the chest on her kitchen table.

Inside were gold coins, glittering gems, and enough to help a lot of people.

She thought about the families in her neighborhood who needed warm coats. About the school that needed books. About the shelter that needed food.

"This treasure doesn't belong to me," she said. "It belongs to everyone who needs it."
pages.scene_description: Children's comic book illustration in the style of Dav Pilkey's Dog Man: bold black outlines, flat bright colors, simple cartoonish shapes, hand-drawn feel, expressive faces, no text or words in the image. A 7-year-old girl with light tan skin and straight brown hair down to her shoulders sits at a kitchen table, the cartoon treasure chest open and overflowing with gold coins and gems. She rests her chin on her hands with a warm thoughtful expression. Soft cartoon thought-bubble images float around her: a coat, a book, a bowl of food.

pages.text_content:
And so she gave it all away.

Every last coin.

And somehow, walking home with empty hands and a gap-toothed smile, Aamilah felt fuller than she ever had before.

Being seven, she decided, was everything she had hoped for.
pages.scene_description: Children's comic book illustration in the style of Dav Pilkey's Dog Man: bold black outlines, flat bright colors, simple cartoonish shapes, hand-drawn feel, expressive faces, no text or words in the image. A bright neighborhood street scene: a 7-year-old girl with light tan skin and straight brown hair down to her shoulders hands coins and gifts to smiling cartoon families, children, and elders bathed in golden light. She stands at the center with arms open wide, the biggest gap-toothed cartoon grin, detective badge glinting.

pages.text_content:
The End.

— The Lesson —

The greatest treasure isn't something you keep.
It's something you give.
pages.scene_description: Children's comic book illustration in the style of Dav Pilkey's Dog Man: bold black outlines, flat bright colors, simple cartoonish shapes, hand-drawn feel, expressive faces, no text or words in the image. A cozy bedroom at night: a 7-year-old girl with light tan skin and straight brown hair down to her shoulders is curled up in bed fast asleep, a tiny gap-toothed smile on her face. Her detective badge and magnifying glass sit on the nightstand. Through the window, a big cartoon full moon glows — and a tiny cartoon dragon sits on the moon, holding a tiny glowing tooth, waving.
